title: Public coverage + outcome dashboard (reads the outcome ledger)
context: OER are abundant and free but are not indexed against the curriculum standards that govern what teachers must teach, so teachers cannot find the free resource aligned to a given standard. This project builds an open crosswalk of educator-reviewed AlignmentRecords linking OER to standards by stable identifier (CASE GUID / ASN URI), not by reproducing copyrighted standards text. Two hard gates never skip: the dual licence/terms gate (gate-002) and educator review of every record, with a blind second-reviewer precision audit holding precision at >= 95%. A public dashboard surfaces success metrics by reading committed ledgers only, never scraping or retaining PII.
objective: Build a public coverage + outcome dashboard that renders the outcome and coverage ledgers.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard reads the outcome ledger and coverage ledger and renders coverage %, reviewed-record counts and verified reuse events.
Reads committed ledgers only (no PII, no scraping); static/regenerable build.
Code MIT; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint green; the commit is DCO signed-off; no credentials or secrets committed.
